description: Completed acquisition and integration of Greenspring Associates, a venture capital and growth equity focused fund-of-funds and secondaries manager with approximately $19B in capital responsibility at the time of closing. The acquisition added dedicated VC/growth capabilities to StepStone's multi-asset-class private markets platform.
stated_rationale: Expand venture capital and growth equity advisory and investment capabilities to provide clients with comprehensive private markets coverage. Greenspring's VC-focused data and relationships complement StepStone's existing PE, infrastructure, credit, and real estate franchise, enabling cross-selling across a broader institutional and wealth client base.
observable_metric_impact: AUM increased from ~$120B to ~$143B upon closing. Total capital responsibility rose from ~$470B to ~$560B. Added approximately 70 investment professionals. Greenspring's VC/growth fund strategies were integrated into the StepStone PE vertical, with venture data assets absorbed into StepStone Private Markets Intelligence (SPI) analytics platform.
op_prereq_summary: Required integration of Greenspring's ~70 professionals and fund portfolio into StepStone's existing PE vertical, data platform migration, and LP consent processes for advisory mandates.

description: Launched StepStone Private Wealth (SPW), a dedicated division targeting high-net-worth individuals and their advisors with access to private markets investments. Flagship product is the SPRING Fund (StepStone Private Markets Fund), a continuously offered, semi-liquid interval fund providing diversified exposure to private equity, infrastructure, private credit, and real estate.
stated_rationale: Capture the secular shift of private wealth capital into alternative investments. Institutional investors have long allocated 20-30% to private markets; high-net-worth individuals allocate less than 5%. SPW leverages StepStone's institutional-quality sourcing, data, and portfolio construction capabilities to serve the wealth channel through simplified access vehicles and financial advisor partnerships.
observable_metric_impact: SPRING Fund launched in Q1 2023, reaching approximately $3.5B in net assets by late 2024. Distribution agreements established with multiple wirehouses and RIA platforms. Private wealth AUM trajectory suggests a multi-billion-dollar contribution to fee-earning AUM growth, with management fees at premium rates relative to institutional SMAs.
op_prereq_summary: Required building a dedicated wealth distribution team, SEC registration of interval fund structures, negotiation of platform distribution agreements with wirehouses, and development of advisor-facing technology and reporting tools.

description: Raised and deployed StepStone Infrastructure Partners Fund (SIF), a dedicated infrastructure commingled fund targeting mid-market infrastructure investments across energy transition, digital infrastructure, and transportation. This represented StepStone's transition from primarily advisory/secondaries in infrastructure to also managing direct primary capital.
stated_rationale: Deepen infrastructure capabilities beyond advisory and co-investment mandates to capture growing institutional demand for dedicated infrastructure allocation vehicles. Infrastructure fundraising has become the fastest-growing segment in alternatives, and StepStone's existing advisory data covering 5,000+ infrastructure funds provides differentiated sourcing for a proprietary direct fund.
observable_metric_impact: Infrastructure-focused AUM grew to approximately $37B in capital responsibility by FY2024. The commingled fund format diversifies StepStone's revenue beyond SMA advisory fees toward higher-margin fund management fees with potential carried interest. Infrastructure represented roughly 17% of total capital responsibility by end of 2024.
op_prereq_summary: Required assembling a dedicated infrastructure direct investment team, structuring a commingled fund vehicle alongside existing SMA and co-investment programs, and leveraging advisory-derived deal flow data for proprietary fund deployment.
